name: openlaunch
description: Launch as a Service platform: AI-native launch command center with MCP-ready tool adapters.

scripts.predev: npm run build -w @openlaunch/core && npm run build -w @openlaunch/launch-server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openlaunch/core && npm run build -w @openlaunch/launch-server && npm run build -w @openlaunch/api && npm run build -w @openlaunch/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @openlaunch/core && npm run typecheck -w @openlaunch/launch-server && npm run typecheck -w @openlaunch/api && npm run typecheck -w @openlaunch/web
